name: Oreo Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. First layer: Crush Oreos and reserve half for topping. Spread the crushed Oreos evenly on the bottom of an ungreased 9x13 pan. Pour melted butter over the crumbs and press evenly and firmly. Refrigerate for one hour.
2. Second layer: Beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing until smooth. Stir in half the Cool Whip until blended. Spoon over the cookie layer. Refrigerate for one hour.
3. Third layer: Mix pudding according to package directions and pour over the cream cheese layer. Refrigerate for one hour.
4. Topping: Top with remaining Cool Whip and sprinkle over reserved crumbs. Refrigerate for one hour.
5. Cut into squares. Makes about 20 squares.
